macro.title: Mortgage applications rise 1.9% despite elevated rates
macro.what: MBA data show mortgage applications rose 1.9% as the 30-year conforming rate increased to 6.69% and purchases rose 6% week over week.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
